title: sphaerium
intro: Sphaerium is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy family. It is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, and is also known as the globe daisy or false dandelion. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of sphaerium include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting kidney function, and it can be consumed as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used in herbal preparations such as salves and ointments.
